title: Lonar Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Lonar Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Maharashtra

overview.short: The Lona Wildlife Sanctuary is situated around a lagoon called Lonar Lake, which was created by a meteorite impact about 50,000 years ago.
overview.description: The Lona Wildlife Sanctuary is situated around a lagoon called Lonar Lake, which was created by a meteorite impact about 50,000 years ago. The diameter of the Lonar lake is 1.83 km. This sanctuary located in Lonar taluka of Buldhana district of Maharashtra. The sanctuary is spread over an area of 365.16 Hectares .

topPlaces.name: Lonar Lake
topPlaces.description: Lonar Lake, also known as Lonar crater, is a saline, soda lake, located near Lonar, 79 km from Buldhana city in Buldhana district, Maharashtra state, India. It has been designated as a National Geological Monument, and is the only crater lake of meteoritic origin in the country.

topPlaces.name: Lonar
topPlaces.description: Lonar is a town, just 79 km from Buldhana city and municipal council in Buldhana district of Vidarbha region of the Indian state of Maharashtra. The town is the headquarter of Lonar taluka and is located near Mehkar.

topPlaces.name: Daitya Sudan Temple
topPlaces.description: Daitya Sudan Temple is a temple near Lonar Lake in the Indian state of Maharashtra.

topPlaces.name: Deulgaon Kundpal
topPlaces.description: Deulgaon, commonly known as "Deulgaon Kundpal" and sometimes as"Deulgaon Kund", is a village located in Lonar taluka of Buldhana district, in state of Maharashtra.

items.note: Lonar Lake, also known as Lonar crater, is a saline, soda lake, located near Lonar, 79 km from Buldhana city in Buldhana district, Maharashtra state, India. It has been designated as a National Geological Monument, and is the only crater lake of meteoritic origin in the country.

Lonar is a town, just 79 km from Buldhana city and municipal council in Buldhana district of Vidarbha region of the Indian state of Maharashtra. The town is the headquarter of Lonar taluka and is located near Mehkar.
Daitya Sudan Temple is a temple near Lonar Lake in the Indian state of Maharashtra.
Deulgaon, commonly known as "Deulgaon Kundpal" and sometimes as"Deulgaon Kund", is a village located in Lonar taluka of Buldhana district, in state of Maharashtra.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Lonar Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Lonar Wildlife Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Lonar Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Aurangabad Airport (117 km) and the nearest railway station is Aurangabad Railway Station (124 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Lonar Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Lonar Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Lonar Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Lonar Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Lonar Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Lonar Lake, Lonar, Daitya Sudan Temple, Deulgaon Kundpal.
